message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for fd_budget.rs (+26) and recorder_export.rs (+26) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

fd_budget.rs: leak detection audits, audit history trimming, empty budget
snapshots, double-register, boundary thresholds, Debug/Clone/Serde traits
for all public types, system limits validation edge cases.

recorder_export.rs: ExportFormat serde roundtrip + hash + traits,
ExportRequest constructors + required_tier A1, ExportError Display
coverage for all variants, ExportResult Debug/Clone, exporter max events,
transcript truncation + header metadata, CSV validation, serde skip_if.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
